parameters.query: INSERT INTO "Document" (organization_id, folder_id, filename, mime_type, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, NULLIF($2, 'null')::integer, $3, $4, 'indexing', NOW(), NOW()) RETURNING id, organization_id, filename, mime_type

parameters.jsCode:
const prevData = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { success: true, document_id: prevData.document_id, chunk_count: prevData.chunk_count || 0, skipped_pages: prevData.skipped_pages || 0, total_pages: prevData.total_pages || 0, ocr_pages: prevData.ocr_pages || 0 } }];
